text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for giving me yesterday off. I really
appreciated the break.
choice_data_list: Were you able to get a lot of rest in?
Were you able to get a lot of rest in?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I managed to wrap up all my dorm leader duties
and talked to my lovely ponies about their
concerns.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I also had a one-on-one race with Hishiama,
watched Opera O's solo show, and...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Entertaining others and enjoying a
good time with them is how I recharge!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki's definition of "rest" is very different
from mine, but she seems alert and refreshed from
her break, and that's all that counts.
